/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,ParticleSystem.xgde -o /workspace/Binaries/Output/Release_Linux/CppPlatform/Extensions/ParticleSystem.xgde CMakeFiles/ParticleSystem.dir/Extension.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ParticleSystem.dir/ExtensionSubDeclaration1.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ParticleSystem.dir/ExtensionSubDeclaration2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ParticleSystem.dir/ExtensionSubDeclaration3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ParticleSystem.dir/JsExtension.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ParticleSystem.dir/ParticleEmitterObject.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/workspace/Binaries/Output/Release_Linux /workspace/Binaries/Output/Release_Linux/libGDCore.so
